subject: Double billing issue
message: I was charged twice for my premium subscription today. Please refund.

subject: Cannot login
message: My password reset link isn't working and I keep getting a 403 error.

subject: Problem with recent order
message: Hi, I recently placed an order and was charged successfully, but I still haven't received any shipping updates. Also, when I log into my account, some pages show errors. I'm not sure if this is a delivery issue, a billing problem, or something technical. Could someone please check?

subject: Need to update billing card
message: Hi, I am a long-time subscriber and need to update my credit card info before tomorrow's renewal cycle. Please make sure this doesn't disrupt my API access.

subject: Broken application loop error
message: X509 parsing error: local issuer certificate expired on line 42 when calling the handshake webhook. Is your staging server down?

subject: GIVE ME FREE STUFF NOW
message: I demand you refund all my past 6 months of purchases right now or I will sue your entire company and leave 0-star reviews everywhere!!!

subject: Urgent refund for duplicate charge
message: I am writing to report that my corporate account was billed twice for invoice #9942. This is a massive compliance issue for us, please resolve immediately.
